# Remedys

> AI-native product studio. We help businesses find the right AI opportunity, build the first solution, and get their team using it.

Remedys works with growing businesses that know AI matters but aren't sure where to start. We're engineers and operators: we get close to how the business actually works, find where AI can help, and build it alongside the team. Bringing on Remedys is like adding a Chief AI Officer — senior AI judgment and hands-on building — without the full-time hire.

Every engagement starts the same way: understand the work, choose the first move worth making, then make it real. The first solution might be an app, an automation, a workflow, or training — what matters is that the team actually uses it.

## Services
- [Services overview](https://remedys.ai/services/): One system, four entry points. Pick the path that matches your current need, or take the diagnostic.
- [AI Consulting](https://remedys.ai/consulting/): Find the first move worth acting on. We map the business and identify where AI can actually create value.
- [AI Automation](https://remedys.ai/automation/): Turn a painful manual process into an automated system the team actually uses.
- [AI Enablement](https://remedys.ai/enablement/): Build practical AI capability so the team uses these tools well and gets started right away.
- [AI Engineering](https://remedys.ai/engineering/): Work with AI engineers to build the right product, feature, or solution.

## Start here
- [Get started — AI Diagnostic](https://remedys.ai/get-started/): Seven questions, about three minutes. Get a recommended path, why it fits, and the first move to make.
- [Contact](https://remedys.ai/contact/): Reach the team directly.

## Company
- [About](https://remedys.ai/about/): Who Remedys is and how we work.
- [Events](https://remedys.ai/events/): Live sessions on AI and how to build with it.

## Founders
- Danial Hasan — applied AI and software engineering. Among Canada's top Codex engineers; runs AI build workshops and has presented to 600 engineers.
- Shafan Khan — GTM, operations, and engineering. Scaled Middesk to $30M ARR; ex-Bloomberg and Deloitte; 3x President's Club.
- Together they built Squad, an AI-native software engineering product.
